payload.text:
Everything you need to explore better.

make all text in 1 or 2 line for laptop and reduce the size so that it does not take much space in mobile

**Refining the Features Component**

I'm currently focused on the "Features" component. My goal is to make the text fit better on laptops, ideally keeping titles to one or two lines. I'm also working to shrink the overall size and spacing, especially for mobile users.


**Analyzing the Layout Details**

I'm now diving into the specifics. I'm taking a close look at the grid item styling. The `p-8` padding seems excessive, so I'm going to reduce it. I'll also try tightening line heights and truncating the descriptions if needed. I'm focusing on making everything more compact, and I'll use responsive classes to ensure it looks good across different screen sizes. My goal is to reduce the heading text size slightly.

entries.description: Refined the Features component to be more compact, ensuring text fits within 1-2 lines on laptops and takes up less vertical space on mobile.
Optimized the hero summary section to be more compact and follow the 1-2 line rule for better laptop viewing.
Reduced padding and font sizes in the Comparison component for a more compact, screen-efficient layout.
